name: dreo-pp-mcp
description: Control Dreo smart fans, heaters, air purifiers, humidifiers, and ACs from the command line.

dreo_password.title: DREO_PASSWORD
dreo_password.description: Password for your Dreo account. The CLI MD5-hashes it before sending to Dreo and never persists the plaintext to disk; only the bearer access token is cached.

dreo_username.title: DREO_USERNAME
dreo_username.description: Email address you use to sign in to the Dreo iOS/Android app.
